top_signals.title: Jim Cramer warns SpaceX could soar to unsustainable levels after its debut
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer warned that overwhelming demand for SpaceX could send the stock to unsustainable levels after it begins trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Poised to Pop After Record IPO
top_signals.summary: Shadow-market trading suggests a 35% gain for the shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
